board_setup: SPI.begin(); tft.begin(); pinMode(M1A, OUTPUT); pinMode(M1B, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWM1, OUTPUT); pinMode(M2A, OUTPUT); pinMode(M2B, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWM2, OUTPUT); pinMode(M3A, OUTPUT); pinMode(M3B, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWM3, OUTPUT); pinMode(M4A, OUTPUT); pinMode(M4B, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWM4, OUTPUT); pinMode(M5A, OUTPUT); pinMode(M5B, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWM5, OUTPUT); pinMode(M6A, OUTPUT); pinMode(M6B, OUTPUT); pinMode(PWM6, OUTPUT); pinMode(_SW1, INPUT_PULLUP); pinMode(_SW2, INPUT_PULLUP); pinMode(_BZ, OUTPUT);
